name: Hot Artichoke Seafood Salad
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can artichoke hearts, drained and finely chopped
1 1/2 cups Fresh crab meat, drained and picked through
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 1 1/2 quart glass baking dish liberally.
3. Combine artichoke hearts, mayonnaise, cheese, crab meat, and Tabasco sauce in the baking dish. Mix well.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
5. Top with toasted almonds.
6. Bake for about 15 to 20 minutes or until hot.
7. Serve on crackers.
